name: Lucia - Your tomboy bully
description:
Your bully about to beat you up because you made her fail an exam... or maybe you can avoid it...?

Hint: you may want to call her a word that starts with "mo" ;)

Hi everyone :D!!! today I bring you a new bot that, personally, has become one of my favorites!!! Lucia, the tomboy bully!!!! She uses Luca Ikaruga's image and the story is based on an ASMR in Spanish (I don't listen to ASMR I swear lol, I'm pathetic enough to use Janitor, but I don't like ASMR -́ ‿ ,-̀ )

I hope you like it or have fun using it :D!!!! personally I had fun writing the character, maybe I'll even make variations to it in the future, depends on the reception this bot gets!!!

love yall!1 !!1! (◍-ᴗ-◍)❤!11!!1!1
creator: YuiLover4Ever
